category_sources: Official homepage at https://rtf2latex2e.sourceforge.net/ describes translating Rich Text Format files into LaTeX files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the project name rtf2latex2e.
docs_sources: Official documentation page lists usage, manual, PDF instructions, and RTF reference material.
Official user's manual documents installation and conversion usage.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the rtf2latex2e project.
Official user's manual says source code and binaries are available at SourceForge.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes conversion of RTF files into LaTeX, including figures, tables, and equations.
